tier_1.title: Merchant Caravan
tier_1.description: A trade caravan trundles past, guards eyeing your party.
tier_1.success: The merchants are friendly. They share news and offer fair prices.
tier_1.failure: They pass without stopping. You learn nothing.

tier_1.title: Washed-Out Bridge
tier_1.description: The river crossing is flooded. The old bridge is half-submerged.
tier_1.success: You find a ford upstream. Boots get wet but no time lost.
tier_1.failure: A long detour around the gorge. Half a day wasted.

tier_1.title: Roadside Shrine
tier_1.description: A weathered shrine to a forgotten god sits beneath an oak.
tier_1.success: Herbs grow thick around the shrine. Useful for poultices.
tier_1.failure: Just old stone and dead offerings.

tier_1.title: Highway Bandits
tier_1.description: Figures step from the treeline, blades drawn. 'Your coin or your life.'
tier_1.success: Spotted early. You choose the ground and they think better of it.
tier_1.failure: Ambush! They attack from both sides.

tier_1.title: Fellow Travelers
tier_1.description: A group of pilgrims shares your road for a stretch.
tier_1.success: They share a meal and rumors of the road ahead.
tier_1.failure: They eye you with suspicion and keep their distance.

tier_2.title: Toll Gate
tier_2.description: Armed soldiers demand a toll to pass. The fee seems steep.
tier_2.success: You know a smuggler's path around the checkpoint.
tier_2.failure: Pay the toll or lose a day going around.

tier_2.title: Dire Wolf Pack
tier_2.description: Unnaturally large wolves pace alongside the road, testing your resolve.
tier_2.success: You spot their den and steer wide. They lose interest.
tier_2.failure: The pack closes in. Fight or flee.

tier_2.title: Thunderstorm
tier_2.description: Black clouds roll in fast. Lightning splits the sky.
tier_2.success: You find shelter in a cave. Even gather some mushrooms.
tier_2.failure: Drenched and miserable. Rations get soaked.

tier_3.title: Enemy War Patrol
tier_3.description: A column of soldiers marches down the road. Their banner is not friendly.
tier_3.success: You spot them first and hide until they pass.
tier_3.failure: They spot you. Prepare for battle.

tier_3.title: Refugee Column
tier_3.description: Hundreds of displaced people clog the road, fleeing something terrible.
tier_3.success: You navigate through quickly and learn what drove them out.
tier_3.failure: Stuck in the crowd. A full day lost.

tier_4.title: Dragon Overhead
tier_4.description: A shadow blots out the sun. Leathery wings. The rush of displaced air.
tier_4.success: Everyone holds still. The dragon passes without noticing you.
tier_4.failure: It circles back. You scatter into the brush and lose supplies.
